bug_report.summary: about:logins Create New Login: Password field label/layout is broken (blank label area + label rendered inside a bordered group)
expected_behaviors: Password label should render in the normal position (consistent with other fields, e.g., above the input).
No extra blank/empty label placeholder area should appear above/near the Password field.
Password input styling should match other standard inputs on the form (no unexpected fieldset/group border behavior).
actual_behaviors: An empty/blank label area appears where the Password label would normally be.
The “Password” label appears to be rendered inside a bordered group/fieldset around the password input, altering spacing and alignment compared to before-change.
